overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following a character walking through a foggy, moonlit mountain trail at night. The character encounters a glowing spectral bird multiple times and travels from a fenced path through forested terrain to a cliff overlooking a dark ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain trail with wooden fencing

events.description: glowing spectral bird appears perched on the wooden fence ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the bird on the fence

notable_agents.action: glowing spectral bird perched on the wooden fence

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the mountains
weathered wooden fence running along the right side of the path
warm glowing lantern illuminating the fog on the left
rocky mountain slopes visible through the mist
glowing white-blue spectral bird perched on the fence

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy dirt path at night, passing a warm lantern light on the left. A wooden fence runs along the right side of the trail, and a glowing spectral bird appears perched on the fence ahead, illuminating the misty surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with scattered pine trees

events.description: wooden fence ends and path opens into wider grassy terrain
spectral bird visible perched on the hilltop ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open trail toward the bird waiting on the hill

notable_agents.action: spectral bird perched on the grassy hilltop ahead

entered.detail: grassy hills and open terrain replacing the fenced corridor
scattered pine trees dotting the landscape
large rocky outcroppings on the mountain slopes

segments.scene_description: The wooden fence ends and the trail opens into a grassy area with scattered pine trees. The character approaches the spectral bird now perched on a hill ahead, with rocky mountain terrain visible in the distance through the fog.

events.description: spectral bird takes flight and passes close by the character
bushes with glowing white flowers become visible along the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the open area as the bird flies past and observing the glowing vegetation

notable_agents.action: spectral bird flying past the character and away into the distance

entered.detail: bushes with luminescent white flowers glowing in the dark

segments.scene_description: The spectral bird takes flight and passes close by the character before disappearing into the distance. The path continues through an open area with glowing white flowers visible in the bushes, and the terrain becomes more exposed to the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail approaching coastal cliff

events.description: trees thin out revealing cliff edge and ocean beyond
spectral bird flies through the trees on the left side

agents.ego_description: navigating through the darker forested section toward the cliff edge

notable_agents.action: spectral bird flying through the pine trees

entered.detail: thick cluster of pine trees creating a darker enclosed corridor
rocky cliff formations at the edge of the terrain
dark ocean water visible beyond the cliff edge
glowing bird reappearing and flying through the forest

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a denser forested area where the spectral bird makes another appearance, flying through the trees. The vegetation becomes thicker and darker before the trees begin to thin out, revealing a cliff edge and the ocean beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge overlooking dark ocean

events.description: character reaches cliff edge with expansive ocean view and rock formations

agents.ego_description: approaching the cliff edge and looking out over the dark water

entered.detail: tall rock spires rising from the ocean water
rocks in the water with waves crashing against them

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest onto a cliff edge overlooking a vast, dark ocean. Large rock formations rise from the water as waves crash against the rocks below, and the foggy coastline stretches into the distance under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, foggy mountain trail that gradually opens into a vast coastal cliffside under a moonlit sky. It begins along a dirt path guided by a warm lantern and a wooden fence, where a glowing spectral bird first appears to illuminate the mist. As the fence ends, the trail expands into a grassy clearing with scattered pine trees and distant rocky peaks before the bird takes flight, leading the camera past glowing white flowers toward a more exposed landscape. The scene then shifts into a denser, darker forested area where the bird weaves through the trees, with the vegetation slowly thinning to reveal a precipice. Finally, the camera emerges from the woods onto a high cliff edge overlooking a dark ocean, where large rock formations rise from the crashing waves along a foggy coastline.
